source_document.title: (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026 and para 16.8 of SEBI Master Circular for
source_document.issuing_authority: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)

regulation.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026
regulation.context: Permits mutual funds to borrow funds for specific purposes and sets limits on borrowings.

regulation.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026
regulation.context: AMCs shall ensure compliance of clauses 6 and 7 of Fourth Schedule of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026 and para 16.8 of SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds dated June 27, 2024.

regulation.title: SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 1996
regulation.context: This circular is issued in exercise of powers conferred under Section 11 (1) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992, read with the provisions of Regulation 77 of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 1996, to protect the interest of investors in securities and to promote the development of, and to regulate the securities market.

master_circular.title: SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds
master_circular.context: AMCs shall ensure compliance of clauses 6 and 7 of Fourth Schedule of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026 and para 16.8 of SEBI Master Circular for Mutual Funds dated June 27, 2024.

circular.title: Closing Auction Session in the equity cash segment of the Stock Exchanges
circular.context: SEBI has introduced Closing Auction Session in the equity cash segment of the Stock Exchanges vide circular reference no. HO/47/11/11(3)2025-MRD-POD2/I/2765/2026 dated January 16, 2026, effective from August 03, 2026.

circular.title: SEBI circular
circular.context: the equity cash segment of the Stock Exchanges with effect from the date of applicability of the aforesaid SEBI circular dated January 16, 2026 and in the manner specified therein.

act.title: Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992
act.context: This circular is issued in exercise of powers conferred under Section 11 (1) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992, read with the provisions of Regulation 77 of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 1996, to protect the interest of investors in securities and to promote the development of, and to regulate the securities market.
